Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers

Class ReportCriteriaDialog

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers.ReportCriteriaDialog
public class ReportCriteriaDialog extends Object
Utility class for displaying a JavaFX dialog to gather criteria for generating reports. The dialog can be configured to show selectors for date ranges (with various modes), funds, and accounts, based on the needs of the specific report. It returns an Optional of ReportCriteria allowing the caller to handle cases where the user cancels the dialog. The dialog also supports pre-populating fields from an existing ReportConfiguration and prompting the user to save the chosen criteria as a new configuration.

      public ReportCriteriaDialog()

  • Method Details

    • showDialog

      public static Optional<ReportCriteria> showDialog(javafx.stage.Window parentWindow, String title, List<Fund> availableFunds, DateSelectionMode dateMode, boolean showFundSelector)
      Shows the report criteria dialog with options for date selection and fund selection. Account selection is disabled. This is a convenience overload for showDialog(Window, String, List, ChartOfAccounts, DateSelectionMode, boolean, boolean, ReportConfiguration).
      Parameters:
      parentWindow - The parent Window for the dialog.
      title - The title of the dialog window.
      availableFunds - A list of Funds available for selection. Can be null or empty.
      dateMode - The DateSelectionMode to configure the date pickers.
      showFundSelector - If true, the fund selection UI will be displayed.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the ReportCriteria if the user confirms, or an empty Optional if the user cancels.

    • showDialog

      public static Optional<ReportCriteria> showDialog(javafx.stage.Window parentWindow, String title, List<Fund> availableFunds, DateSelectionMode dateMode, boolean showFundSelector, ReportConfiguration initialConfig)
      Shows the report criteria dialog with options for date selection, fund selection, and pre-populating with an initial configuration. Account selection is disabled. This is a convenience overload for showDialog(Window, String, List, ChartOfAccounts, DateSelectionMode, boolean, boolean, ReportConfiguration).
      Parameters:
      parentWindow - The parent Window for the dialog.
      title - The title of the dialog window.
      availableFunds - A list of Funds available for selection. Can be null or empty.
      dateMode - The DateSelectionMode to configure the date pickers.
      showFundSelector - If true, the fund selection UI will be displayed.
      initialConfig - A ReportConfiguration to pre-populate dialog fields. Can be null.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the ReportCriteria if the user confirms, or an empty Optional if the user cancels.

    • showDialog

      public static Optional<ReportCriteria> showDialog(javafx.stage.Window parentWindow, String dialogTitle, List<Fund> availableFunds, ChartOfAccounts chartOfAccounts, DateSelectionMode dateMode, boolean showFundSelector, boolean showAccountSelector, ReportConfiguration initialConfig)
      Displays a dialog for the user to input report criteria. The dialog includes fields for date selection (start/end dates based on dateMode), optionally a fund selector, and optionally an account selector. It can be pre-populated with an initialConfig. The user can run the report or save the configuration and run.
      Parameters:
      parentWindow - The parent Window for the dialog, used for modality.
      dialogTitle - The title for the dialog window.
      availableFunds - A list of Funds to populate the fund selector. Can be null or empty if showFundSelector is false.
      chartOfAccounts - The ChartOfAccounts used to populate the account selector. Can be null if showAccountSelector is false.
      dateMode - The DateSelectionMode that dictates how date pickers are shown and validated.
      showFundSelector - If true, a multi-select list view for funds is included.
      showAccountSelector - If true, a multi-select list view for accounts is included.
      initialConfig - An optional ReportConfiguration to pre-fill the dialog's fields. Can be null.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the ReportCriteria gathered from the user if they confirm (by clicking "Run Report" or "Save Configuration & Run"). Returns an empty Optional if the user cancels the dialog or if name input for saving configuration is cancelled. Returns null from the result converter if validation fails (e.g., required dates missing).
